rows.notes: Consensus between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini. Clear year header.

gpt-5-mini was closer in separating the header, but its description 'Soluta. pro Rectori. Scholaribus, et' was corrected to 'Soluta Dno Rectori. Scholaribus. et' based on visual verification. gemini-flash incorrectly merged this line with the subsequent one.

Adopted gpt-5-mini's structural identification of this as a separate row, correcting 'Officiaris -' to 'Officiariis. -' based on visual verification. gemini-flash incorrectly merged this line into its prior row.
